title: pellaea muelleri
intro: Pellaea muelleri, also known as the Mountain Strap Fern, is a species of fern that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pellaea muelleri include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Pellaea muelleri can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
